zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Kennedy於1465年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾馬波爾時，她的父親John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy29歲，母親Elizabeth Montgomery25歲。她於1485年9月15日與Thomas Kennedy 3rd of Bargany在蘇格蘭艾斯爾巴甘尼結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1533年在她的家鄉享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Kennedy于1465年出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾馬波爾时，她的父亲John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy29岁，母亲Elizabeth Montgomery25岁。她于1485年9月15日与Thomas Kennedy 3rd of Bargany在苏格兰艾斯爾巴甘尼结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1533年在她的家乡享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kennedy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ceannéidigh ‘descendant of Ceannéidigh’ (from ceann ‘head’ + éidigh ‘ugly’); or from the Scottish Gaelic Mac Cinnèidigh, consisting of mac ‘son’ with an equivalent name. Compare Canaday , Cannady , Cannedy , Kannady , and Kenedy .

History: Kennedy ancestral lands are found both in Ireland and in Scotland, where the family's medieval ancestral seat is sited on the Ayrshire coast, facing the Irish Sea. — The great-grandparents of President John Fitzgerald Kennedy (1917–63) came to North America as immigrants from Ireland in the 1840s. His paternal great-grandparents were Patrick Kennedy (1823–58), born in Dunganstown, County Wexford, Ireland, and Bridget Murphy, who was born probably in Owenduff, County Wexford, Ireland c. 1827; they came to Boston, MA, in 1849. His maternal great-grandparents were Thomas Fitzgerald (1823–85), who was born in Bruff, County Limerick, Ireland, and Rose Anna Cox, who was born probably in Tomregan or Kinawley, County Cavan, Ireland, c. 1835; they came to Boston, MA, in 1857. — An early Scottish Kennedy forebear of a quite different family was British colonial official Archibald Kennedy (1685–1763), the son of Alexander Kennedy of Craigoch, who emigrated to NY c. 1710.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Kennedy was born in 1465, in Maybole, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy, was 29 and her mother, Elizabeth Montgomery, was 25. She married Thomas Kennedy 3rd of Bargany on 15 September 1485, in Bargany, Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1533, in her hometown, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Kennedy est née en 1465, à Maybole, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Montgomery, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Kennedy 3rd of Bargany le 15 septembre 1485, à Bargany, Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1533, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Kennedy 1465 in Maybole, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy 29 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Montgomery 25. Sie hat am 15. September 1485 in Bargany, Ayrshire, Scotland Thomas Kennedy 3rd of Bargany geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1533 im Alter von 68 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Kennedyが1465年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアメイボルで生まれた時，父John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedyは29歳，母Elizabeth Montgomeryは25歳であった。1485年9月15日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアバーガニーでThomas Kennedy 3rd of Barganyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1533年に故郷で68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Kennedy(이)가 1465년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 메이볼일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Montgomery(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1485년 9월 15일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 바건이에서 Thomas Kennedy 3rd of Bargany(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1533년 그녀의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Kennedy родилась в 1465 г. в местности меибол, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Montgomery, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Kennedy 3rd of Bargany 15 сентября 1485 г. в местности баргани, аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1533 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 68 лет.
